test_cases.prompt:
Analyze this codebase for cleanup. Identify all issues including dead code, unnecessary abstractions, AI slop patterns, and duplicated logic. Prioritize findings by impact.

{fixture:1-ai-slop-codebase}
expected_behaviors: Identifies DatabaseManager as unnecessary wrapper around sqlite3.connect()
Identifies StringHelper as unnecessary wrapper around str.strip()
Identifies try/except/raise as catch-rethrow with no added value
Identifies excessive comments explaining obvious operations
Identifies process_data and handle_data as duplicated functions
Identifies 3 unused imports (os, sys, json) as dead code
Identifies commented-out function as dead code

test_cases.prompt:
Analyze this codebase for cleanup. Identify all issues including security vulnerabilities, dead code, unnecessary abstractions, and code quality problems. Prioritize findings by impact.

{fixture:2-hidden-security-in-mess}
expected_behaviors: Identifies command injection via os.system with user input as highest-priority finding
Prioritizes security finding above all style and slop issues
Identifies os.system with f-string interpolation as the attack vector

test_cases.prompt:
Analyze this codebase for cleanup. Identify all issues including dead code, unnecessary abstractions, AI slop patterns, and duplicated logic. Report only genuine issues.

{fixture:3-clean-codebase}
expected_behaviors: No significant issues exist in the code
Code is well-structured with appropriate abstractions
Docstrings and error handling are appropriate, not excessive

test_cases.prompt:
Analyze this codebase for cleanup. Identify all issues including dead code, unnecessary abstractions, AI slop patterns, and duplicated logic. Be precise: only flag genuine issues, not intentional design patterns.

{fixture:4-mixed-real-and-slop}
expected_behaviors: Identifies unused import (re) as dead code
Identifies catch-rethrow as unnecessary
Does NOT flag similar-named functions as duplicates (they have different logic)
Does NOT flag connection pool wrapper as unnecessary (it adds real value)

test_cases.prompt:
Analyze this codebase for cleanup opportunities. Identify all issues, prioritize by severity, and propose a cleanup plan.

{fixture:5-dirty-app-full-codebase}
expected_behaviors: Identifies at least 8 of the 11 planted issues across the codebase
Classifies security issues (SSRF, injection, JWT confusion) as critical/high severity
Identifies the TOCTOU race as a concurrency/correctness issue
Notes the test quality issues (assert True, missing edge cases)
Does NOT flag validators.py — it is clean code

test_cases.prompt:
Analyze this codebase for cleanup opportunities. Identify all issues, prioritize by severity, and propose a cleanup plan.

{fixture:6-clean-app-full-codebase}
expected_behaviors: Recognizes the codebase follows security best practices
Does NOT fabricate security vulnerabilities in well-written code
Does NOT flag os.environ['SECRET_KEY'] as a hardcoded secret
Does NOT flag the broad except in the error handler as an issue
May suggest minor improvements but marks them as non-blocking
